task_completion.description: Access the ADAudit Plus web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the ADAudit Plus interface, typically after logging in with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Set the alert profile name, severity, and category
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the new alert profile form, the name field contains 'WiFi_DC_Logon_Violation', the severity dropdown is set to 'Critical', and the category is set to 'Logon'.

task_completion.description: Configure the trigger condition for the target subnet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The alert criteria or condition section shows 'Client IP Address' with the operator 'starts with' (or equivalent) and the value '192.168.50'.
The alert message field contains exactly 'Unauthorized access detected from Wi-Fi subnet'.
A success message indicating the profile was created, or the 'WiFi_DC_Logon_Violation' profile is visible in the list of configured alert profiles.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating to localhost:8081, not a terminal using curl or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands (like INSERT INTO AlertProfile) or database management tools like pgAdmin.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the ADAudit Plus UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual ADAudit Plus web interface with dropdowns and text fields being actively filled out, rather than a text editor or mock file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Alert Profile Name: 'WiFi_DC_Logon_Violation'. Severity: 'Critical'. Category: 'Logon'. Trigger Condition: Client IP Address starts with '192.168.50'. Alert Message: 'Unauthorized access detected from Wi-Fi subnet'.
